creator: russo@bogodyn.org
text:
For a few weeks now I've seen this error when attempting to portupgrade qt5-3d:

===>   Registering installation for qt5-3d-5.6.1 as automatic
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/graphics/qt5-3d/work/stage/usr/local/lib/cmake/Qt53DRender/Qt53DRender_AssimpParserPlugin.cmake: No such file or directory
pkg-static: Unable to access file /usr/ports/graphics/qt5-3d/work/stage/usr/local/lib/cmake/Qt53DRender/Qt53DRender_GLTFSceneParserPlugin.cmake: No such file or directory


This failure prevents a portupgrade of qt5-5.5.1 to qt5-5.6.1 from completing (all other qt packages have updated save this one subpackage and the meta port).
